245c4e7bcc3d6f23bf116fd9520c498b22d9da33.why_relevant: If you're looking to build an AI/ML project for social good and want to practice your skills in a structured environment with a decent prize pool, this could be a good opportunity to add a project to your portfolio, especially if you can leverage the "beginner friendly" aspect to stand out with a high-quality submission.

bb37583fdc4f64b2b5e7ff969095f32791d29af2.why_relevant: This event is primarily for students of JEMTEC and offers no significant prizes or career opportunities. It's not relevant for external builders seeking high-impact hackathons.

1018b881fcb95ab5d36ff141e32c09971305c9e3.title: Open Source Competition
1018b881fcb95ab5d36ff141e32c09971305c9e3.why_relevant: If you're passionate about open source and want to build a portfolio project, this event provides a structured environment for individual contributions. However, don't expect direct prizes or high-profile networking.

956f0d0f500e9ef225adce4ebd4a5dfa7293cc14.title: No Python. No Excuses. Build AI Agents with Mastra
956f0d0f500e9ef225adce4ebd4a5dfa7293cc14.why_relevant: If you're keen on exploring AI agent development without diving deep into Python, this offline workshop offers a focused learning experience with the Mastra platform. It's a direct skill-building opportunity in a relevant tech niche.

a1f3d00edc38c64026b53599a730e0cd93d5b18b.why_relevant: This event is primarily for local undergraduate students and offers no significant prizes or career opportunities. It's not relevant for external builders seeking high-impact hackathons.

35ba406ae034651e209ce55efe798daf9479f6ce.title: AWS Activate Program for Web3 Startups
35ba406ae034651e209ce55efe798daf9479f6ce.why_relevant: If you're a Web3 founder or aspiring to build a Web3 startup, this is an elite opportunity. AWS Activate provides critical cloud infrastructure and support, while association with Blockchain.com adds industry credibility. The high startup potential and significant cloud credits make this a must-apply event for serious builders in the Web3 space.

21cf7dafd65318aebdf10102d2f9c26be2e207a2.title: Watson Code Fest 2026
21cf7dafd65318aebdf10102d2f9c26be2e207a2.why_relevant: If you have expertise in bioinformatics, computational biology, or healthcare AI, this hackathon offers a unique opportunity to apply your skills using industry-standard tools like Snakemake and Biopython. Despite the small prize, the niche focus and offline format provide excellent networking with domain experts and a chance to build a highly specialized portfolio project.

2b15f74bd9d14802152e2f9067213051dd24ca86.title: Advanced Graph Theory
2b15f74bd9d14802152e2f9067213051dd24ca86.why_relevant: If you're looking to deepen your expertise in a highly specialized and valuable area of computer science, this workshop on Advanced Graph Theory offers a focused learning opportunity. It's excellent for enhancing your algorithmic skills for complex problem-solving in various domains.

78d1885c1f5e23a96688ab9ca016dea03e474af4.title: BMS Design for EV
78d1885c1f5e23a96688ab9ca016dea03e474af4.why_relevant: If you're an electrical engineer or automotive enthusiast looking to specialize in the booming EV sector, this workshop on BMS Design for EV offers a crucial skill-building opportunity. It's highly relevant for careers in battery technology and electric vehicle development.

48cc7fd31b3d1d61a84a10cf04328ce0607f0fe8.why_relevant: If you're an educator or researcher, this FDP offers a valuable opportunity to understand and apply AI's transformative potential in education and research. It's a direct investment in your professional development within the academic sphere.

1358655db2ecf8d43b6d572aca7eb7f0a40083a2.why_relevant: If you're passionate about the intersection of advanced sensor technology, AI, and healthcare, this workshop offers a unique opportunity to gain expertise in Fiber Optic Sensors and AI for Healthcare. bbc085d22875e942b26fcfd0b89717ed9ad61d79.title: THE ULTIMATE QUEST
bbc085d22875e942b26fcfd0b89717ed9ad61d79.why_relevant: This hackathon lacks significant incentives (prizes, sponsors, high-profile networking) and is unlikely to offer substantial career or startup opportunities.
